name: file-output
description: Writes processed data to files in various formats (JSON, CSV, or raw text).
author: hermes-core

output_dir.title: Output Directory
output_dir.description: Directory path where output files will be written.

filename_template.title: Filename Template
filename_template.description: Template for output filenames. Supports {timestamp}, {date}, {uuid}, {index} placeholders.

format.title: Output Format
format.description: File format for the output data.

json_indent.title: JSON Indent
json_indent.description: Number of spaces for JSON indentation. 0 for compact output.

overwrite.title: Overwrite Existing
overwrite.description: If true, overwrite existing files. If false, skip or append based on format.

create_dirs.title: Create Directories
create_dirs.description: Create the output directory if it does not exist.

output_dir.ui:help: Directory where files will be written

file_path.description: Full path of the written file.
